title: Step context frontmatter
description: Optional YAML frontmatter contract for `.context.md` files referenced from a workflow step's `context_file:` field. Every field is optional; presence is checked against the step shape by `Owl::Workflows::Internal::StepContextFrontmatterCheck` during `owl workflow validate`. Local override: `.owl/schemas/step_context_frontmatter.json` via `Owl::Validation::Internal::SchemaResolver` (see KOS-154).

step_id.description: Identifier of the workflow step this context file belongs to. When present must match the step's `id:` in workflow.yaml.

applies_to_session_type.description: Session kind the context targets. When present must match the step's `session_type:`.

applies_to_variants.description: Variant keys this context applies to. Only meaningful on steps that declare a `variants:` block. For variant-bound files (e.g. `brief.feature.context.md`) the derived variant must appear in this list.

intended_audience.description: Whether the context is authored for the orchestrator session or for an isolated subagent invocation.

summary.description: One-line human summary; cosmetic, not consumed by the runtime.
